'''Force Slow''' was a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] used by [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] and [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] around [[3956 BBY|4,000 BBY]]. '''Force exhaustion''' was a variant of the power used by [[Jedi Guardian/Legends|Jedi Guardians]] during the time of the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] and the [[Galactic War]] to gradually slow down the movement of enemies.

This power clouded the target's mind, causing them to slow down both mentally and physically. It was the milder version of two other poison-inspiring [[The Force/Legends|Force]] powers, the other ones being '''Force Affliction''' and '''Force Plague'''. Practitioners of this power included the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Juhani]] and a [[Unidentified Jedi Knight (Clone Wars)|Jedi]].

Force Affliction was a variant of Force Slow. Affliction worked much like a fast-acting poison, quickly debilitating the target. The effects of affliction worsened over time and may cause death if the user is strong enough in the Force.

Force Plague was a more powerful version of Force Affliction. Plague worked like a fast-acting toxin, horribly debilitating its victims. The effects of Plague continued to worsen over time. [[Kreia|Darth Traya]] and [[Darth Nihilus]] attempted to use this technique against [[Meetra Surik]].

==Behind the scenes==
In the expansion ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan]]'' of the game ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] uses a [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] named Mass affliction which might be a variant of Force Affliction. The effect is the same and drastically slows down the player and all companions.<ref name="SWTOR">{{TORcite|exp=shadow|type=weekly|The Enemy Within|Yavin IV}}</ref>
